ideas.title: The last video rental shop in Berlin
ideas.description: A profile of the one remaining video rental store in the city and the community around it.

ideas.title: Wim Wenders und die Straßen Berlins
ideas.description: Wie Wenders' Filme die Stadt als Kulisse und Thema nutzen.

ideas.title: Berlin After CSD — What Stays When the Glitter Fades
ideas.description: A frank look at what the weeks after Christopher Street Day actually feel like for Berlin's queer locals — the exhaustion, the comedowns, and the community work that continues without a parade.

ideas.title: Queer Swimming in Berlin — A Summer Guide to the City's Lakes and Lidos
ideas.description: A practical yet political guide to Berlin's outdoor swimming spots, exploring which spaces feel genuinely safe and welcoming for queer and trans* bodies and which still carry tensions.

ideas.title: The DJs Who Build the Room — Portraits of Three Queer Berlin Residents Behind the Decks This Summer
ideas.description: Short, intimate portraits of three queer DJs — one established, one emerging, one visiting — exploring how they think about building a dancefloor as an act of community care.

ideas.title: Queeres Kino im Sommer: Berlins LGBTI*-Filmszene zwischen Open-Air und Programmkino
ideas.description: Ein Überblick über queere Filmvorführungen, Festivals und Sonderprogramme in Berlin im Sommer 2026 — von Freiluftscreenings bis zu Programmkinos wie dem Wolf oder Kino Moviemento.

ideas.title: Interview with founder of "Meetmarket" app
ideas.description: A new community run competitor to Grindr has surfaced, we talk to the person behind it.
